assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value: Generate a premium product image on a clean studio background. High detail, realistic lighting, sharp focus.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseModalities: ['TEXT', 'IMAGE'], imageConfig: { aspectRatio: $json.aspectRatio } } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, source: $json.source, requestId: $json.requestId, model: $json.model, aspectRatio: $json.aspectRatio, mimeType: $json.mimeType, imageBase64: $json.imageBase64, imageSizeBytes: $json.imageSizeBytes, text: $json.text || '' } }}
